description: This HTML file serves as the frontend interface for a database visualizer application. It includes CSS styling for layout and components, and JavaScript for dynamic interactions such as fetching database lists, tables, and data, rendering tables, and managing UI states.

methods.name: loadDatabases
methods.description: Fetches the list of databases from the server and renders them in the sidebar.

methods.name: refreshDatabases
methods.description: Refreshes the database list, resets UI states, and triggers reloading of databases.

methods.name: toggleDatabase
methods.description: Expands or collapses the database to show its tables.

methods.name: loadTables
methods.description: Fetches and displays tables for a selected database.

methods.name: loadTableData
methods.description: Loads and displays data for a selected table.

methods.name: renderTable
methods.description: Creates and inserts an HTML table based on data fetched from the server.

methods.name: renderCell
methods.description: Renders individual table cell content, handling objects, long strings, and nulls.

methods.name: expandCell
methods.description: Expands or collapses cell content on clicking, especially for long texts or objects.
